TMC Operations

A stronger operating platform for TMCs

Travel management companies need more than booking support. They need a platform that helps them onboard clients, apply governance, manage integrations, and scale service delivery with confidence.

⚡

Faster Client Onboarding

Bring new clients into a controlled operating environment without treating each account as a custom rebuild. Cinturon360 is being designed to make structured onboarding repeatable across organisational structure, traveller setup, policy, and integrations.

🏗️

Client-Specific Operating Models

Every client can have its own approval structures, travel policies, reporting expectations, booking channel mix, and integration needs. Manage that complexity without relying on manual workarounds and fragmented systems.

🔒

Secure Client Management

Maintain clear separation between client environments. Role-based access, client boundaries, and structured user management give TMCs and their clients confidence in how the platform is controlled.

🔄

Self-Service That Supports TMCs

Give clients visibility into their own travel program — spend, approvals, policy position — without removing the TMC from the service model. Self-service that helps clients without bypassing the agency relationship.

Problems Cinturon360 is designed to solve for TMCs

Slow and inconsistent client onboarding
Client-by-client variation in operating models
Fragmented approval and policy handling
Disconnected visibility across client accounts
Heavy manual servicing overhead
Weak separation between client environments
Limited standardisation at scale
Difficulty connecting to diverse integration landscapes

Cinturon360 is coming soon

Cinturon360 is an upcoming travel governance and visibility platform designed to work with existing booking channels, apply policy and approvals, and deliver finance-grade reporting. Join the waitlist to follow the launch.

Join Waitlist Book a Demo
